featured.title: ChefPaws
featured.desc: Engineered an enterprise-grade Decoupled CMS architecture achieving 100/100 Lighthouse performance. Orchestrated a Headless Drupal 11 backend with a Go-based logic layer and an Astro/Svelte frontend.

featured.title: Harmony Homes
featured.desc: Architected a high-concurrency MLS data engine. Optimized search performance and data hydration workflows using Prisma and real-time API polling.

featured.title: Harwood Houses
featured.desc: Led the digital overhaul of recovery housing operations. Replaced manual bottlenecks with a reactive Svelte application, ensuring high data integrity and automated intake.
